outline.text: 1.2. Get started with Cortex Cloud APIs
1.3. Get your Cortex API key ID
1.8. API Release Notes for Cortex Cloud
2.1.3.1. Get all or filtered asset groups
2.1.4.3. Get raw fields of asset by ID
2.1.4.5. Get enum values of specified field
2.1.7.1. Create authentication settings for IdP SSO or metadata URL
2.1.7.4. Get authentication settings for all configured domains
2.1.9.3. Retrieve Case Artifacts by Case Id
2.1.11.1. Get the latest version of the Cortex CLI
2.1.16.7. Retrieve issue exceptions based on filters
2.1.17.1. Add or update data in a lookup dataset
2.1.17.2. Remove data from a lookup dataset
2.1.17.3. Get data from a lookup dataset
2.1.25.2. Get all or filtered syslog servers
2.1.25.4. Delete all or filtered syslog integrations
2.3. Cortex Cloud Alert Notification Rules REST APIs
2.3.2.3. Retrieve a specific alert notification rule
2.3.2.4. Delete an existing Alert Notification Rule
2.3.2.5. Edit an existing Alert Notification Rule
2.3.2.6. Edit the status of an existing Alert Notification Rule
2.4. ASPM, CICD and Application Security APIs
2.4.4.1.1.1. Trigger and Action Constraints by Finding Type
2.4.8.1. Get unscanned AppSec scan management repositories
2.4.9.1. Get an SBOM for the specified repository
2.4.9.2. Get all SBOMs for the specified organization
2.6. Cortex Cloud Logging and Collection Service Management APIs
2.7.2.1. Create a cloud onboarding integration template
2.7.2.3. Get all or filtered cloud instances
2.7.2.7. Get identifier roles for cloud instance
2.7.3.1. Get accounts in the specified cloud instances
2.7.5.1. Get available regions for a CSP
2.9.5.1. Add compliance rules to a compliance control
2.11.2.3. Get a CWP Policy by ID (v2)
2.11.2.4. Update a CWP Policy by ID (v2)
2.11.2.7. Get a CWP Policy by ID (v1)
2.11.2.8. Delete a CWP Policy by ID (v1)
2.11.2.9. Update a CWP Policy by ID (v1)
2.11.3.1. Get the SBOM of the specified asset
2.12. Disable Injection and Prevention Rules Public API
2.12.2.1. Get Disable Injection and Prevention rules
2.12.2.2. Add Disable Injection and Prevention rule
2.12.2.3. Disable Disable Injection and Prevention Rules
